title: Relation
description: A typed relation in the knowledge graph. Predicate vocabulary is restricted to DataCite relationTypes plus the single proprietary pair ams:implements / ams:isImplementedBy. Generic 'relatedWork' and 'ams:supersedes' are forbidden (ASV-REL-001/005/006).

target_id.description: Internal Work id (e.g. amw-003) when the target is inside the corpus.

target_doi.description: External DOI when the target is outside the corpus.
